one_time_description: Impairment of tangible capital assets - former community building removed from productive use and scheduled for hazardous material abatement and demolition
economic_notes: Nation operates N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., and N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation. St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust settlement with BC and BC Hydro for hydro development impacts. COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with ongoing impacts noted.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) incomplete tangible capital assets listing potentially containing unused or impaired assets; (2) insufficient allowance for bad debts on $402,457 due from band members of which $399,204 is significantly overdue. Three subsidiaries fully consolidated: N'Quatqua Logging Co. Ltd., N'Quatqua Fisheries Inc., N'Quatqua Employment & Economic Development Corporation. No GBEs. Bank indebtedness of $97,462 offsets cash. St'at'imc Trust assets of $1,699,482 and Ottawa Trust of $318,235 included in financial position. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,230,142) + First Nations Health Authority ($451,259) + Government of Canada ($216,384) + Province of BC ($668,443) + CMHC ($57,242) + FNESC ($50,339) + New Relationship Trust ($32,900) = $2,706,709; excluded St'at'imc Trust ($214,487) and Tribal Councils ($132,597) and BC Hydro ($5,393) as non-government; OSR adjusted accordingly. Prior year audited by a different firm with unmodified opinion. COVID-19 pandemic disclosed as subsequent event uncertainty.
